title: heliophila thunbergii
intro: Heliophila thunbergii, also known as the Cape marigold or silver-leaved heliophila, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Heliophila thunbergii can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
